title: Just Meloetta
description: A datapack that adds Meloetta to cobblemon. That's it.
body:
The assets and most of the data files were **not created by me**, they come from [Legendary Encounters (Cobblemon)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/legendary-encounters(cobblemon)?version=1.20.1). However, this datapack has not been updated to Cobblemon 1.6, and has many more features. I simply took the Meloetta files and made them compatible with Cobblemon 1.6 and Minecraft 1.21.1. I just wanted a way for my partner to get Meloetta on our server, and thought I'd share with you all.

**PUT IN RESOURCE PACK FOLDER TOO**

Full Credit: [Legendary Encounters (Cobblemon)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/legendary-encounters(cobblemon))
